item.title: officialgaa: The GAA @officialgaa · 18min . @KildareGAA captain, Kevin Feely, believes the new era of contested kick-outs in the mid
item.description: The GAA @officialgaa · 18min . @KildareGAA captain, Kevin Feely, believes the new era of contested kick-outs in the middle of the pitch has given his inter-county career a new lease of life. #GAABelong De gaa.ie 688
